description: Initial 10 scientific video prompts used for debugging and pilot evaluation.

prompts.prompt: A realistic scientific visualization of a single water molecule rotating slowly, with one oxygen atom and two hydrogen atoms clearly visible, connected at a bent molecular angle.
A clear educational animation of a DNA double helix rotating slowly, with paired bases visible and two continuous strands spiraling consistently.
A microscope-style scientific video of a cell membrane showing a phospholipid bilayer, with embedded proteins and stable membrane structure.
A clean scientific animation of an atom with a central nucleus and orbiting electrons, stable structure, no extra particles.
A realistic educational video of mitosis, showing chromosomes aligning at the center of the cell before separating to opposite poles.
A scientific visualization of a neuron, showing dendrites, soma, axon, and signal propagation along the axon.
A clean animation of protein folding, showing a chain of amino acids folding into a compact stable 3D structure.
A scientific animation of blood cells flowing through a blood vessel, with red blood cells maintaining consistent shape and direction.
A realistic visualization of a solar system model, with planets orbiting the sun in stable circular paths.
A clean educational video of photosynthesis inside a leaf cell, showing chloroplasts, light absorption, and chemical energy production.
